generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane state including positions, velocities, and sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance StepperMotorCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance StepperMotorHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor controller for stepper motors"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance CADModelFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia models for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for database, MQTT broker, and dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for storing crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for real-time visualization of crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data transfer"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model for crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides MoveCartMotorAction, MoveHoistMotorAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane state data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccessInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane data using Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing simulated and actual trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlertInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for validation and training"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizations of crane state with simulated confidence bounds"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts for breaches in continuous validation between simulated and actual trajectories"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for fault localization using time series classification for maintenance decisions"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to historical crane state data for analysis"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from crane dynamics simulation for validation"
]

instance MoveCartMotorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls stepper motor for cart movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MoveHoistMotorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls stepper motor for hoist movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, Electromagnet, TMC4671EvalMotorController, Arduino, CADModelFusion360, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, ArcadiaModel, CraneStateData, TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, EclipseMosquittoEnabler, PythonGantrylibEnabler, DockerEnabler, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService, DashboardVisualizationInsight, ContinuousValidationAlertInsight, FaultLocalizationInsight, HistoricalDataAccessInsight, SimulationResultsInsight, MoveCartMotorAction, MoveHoistMotorAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface to move the cart and hoist motors."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur in real-time with no specified fixed intervals, as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via C4 Model architecture: physical crane, physical interface, control application, logging application, HMI, database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation service, continuous validation service, and MQTT broker; deployed on a single PC with Docker containers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers design (CAD models in Fusion360), manufacturing (physical hardware components), and operation phases (continuous validation of real-time operational data); used in Model-Based Systems Engineering education for lifecycle integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectories with simulations, calculating distance metrics against a threshold; deviations trigger operator notifications, ensuring model validity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python-based interface for physical controller communication; TimescaleDB for data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) on a personal computer; gantrylib Python module installed via pip; GitHub-hosted repository for distribution."
]
